settings.title:
Strength on
your terms
settings.body: The studied 5g daily amount of creatine monohydrate. Creatine increases physical performance in successive bursts of short-term, high-intensity exercise — the authorised claim, word for word.

settings.title:
Hair, skin,
nails — fed
settings.body: The full 5g of Verisol® bioactive collagen peptides, with hyaluronic acid alongside. In the same scoop, biotin contributes to the maintenance of normal hair and normal skin and vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation.

settings.title:
The studied
support crew
settings.body: Myo + D-chiro inositol 40:1 at 500mg — studied in PCOS research. Dandelion root is traditionally used to support the body's normal fluid balance; cranberry is traditionally used to support urinary tract comfort.

settings.title:
The bits you're
always low on
settings.body: Biotin 5,000µg, L-methylfolate 400µg, B6 as P-5-P, chromium, vitamin C, vegan D3 — plus vitamins A · E · K2 and a full B-complex, all at 100% NRV, folded into the same scoop.

settings.title: Scoop 14g
settings.body: One level scoop — 5g creatine, 5g Verisol® collagen and the complete multivitamin, all in.

settings.title: Shake with 200ml
settings.body: Cold water, 10 seconds. It turns the softest pink — strawberry lemonade, naturally flavoured, no added sugar.

settings.title: Drink every morning
settings.body: Training days and rest days. The dose works by showing up daily — same as you.

settings.title: Days 1–7 · half scoop
settings.body: 7g in 200ml of cold water, every morning. Half the dose, same ritual — you're building the habit first.

settings.title: Day 8 onwards · full scoop
settings.body: Move up to the full 14g scoop. This is the studied daily amount — from here, it's just consistency.

settings.title: Miss a day?
settings.body: Just carry on the next morning. No doubling up, no guilt. The ritual works because it's kind.

settings.question: Is creatine safe for women?
settings.answer: Creatine monohydrate is one of the most-studied supplement ingredients there is, and 5g a day is the amount used across that research — in women as well as men. The authorised claim is specific: creatine increases physical performance in successive bursts of short-term, high-intensity exercise. It's a food supplement for healthy adults; if you take medication or manage a condition, check with your GP first.

settings.question: Is it really halal certified?
settings.answer: Yes — certified under HMC protocol GB18/2026, including source-of-slaughter certification for the bovine collagen. The certificate is available on request.

settings.question: Can I take it while pregnant or breastfeeding?
settings.answer: No. The Daily is for healthy adults and is not suitable if you are pregnant or breastfeeding. If you're taking medication or managing a condition, please consult your GP before starting any supplement.

settings.question: What does it taste like?
settings.answer: Strawberry lemonade — naturally flavoured, no added sugar. And if you hate it, our 30-day flavour guarantee means we refund the pouch. That simple.

settings.question: What about shipping and returns?
settings.answer: Free UK shipping, 1–2 days, from London. If the flavour isn't for you, tell us within 30 days and we refund the pouch — no return postage, no questions. Subscriptions can be paused or cancelled anytime.
